payload.answer: I’m not sure what “the thing from yesterday” refers to. Please clarify what you want remembered before I can suggest a memory action.
repair_options: Specify the exact fact, preference, event, or reminder you want remembered.
Provide enough context to identify what happened yesterday.
If this refers to an existing memory, name or describe that memory so it can be matched.
If you want a new memory added, restate it as a clear sentence.
